title: Implement HomeAndConstructionBusiness Schema (Homepage + Service Pages)
description:
Replace the existing LocalBusiness schema on the homepage with a correctly typed HomeAndConstructionBusiness node. The @type array should read: ["HomeAndConstructionBusiness", "LocalBusiness", "GeneralContractor"].
Add the following missing properties: areaServed (array of 21 city nodes with name, @type, and Wikidata sameAs links), openingHoursSpecification (00:00–23:59 all 7 days), hasOfferCatalog (service nodes for 8 residential and 4 commercial service lines), priceRange ("$$"), and knowsAbout (UL 325 garage door safety, LiftMaster installation,
Clopay garage doors, commercial dock equipment). For the Austin and Round Rock locations, create separate
LocalBusiness nodes with individual geo coordinates linked to the homepage schema via the @id property chain.

title: FAQPage Schema on 8 High-Impression Blog Posts
description:
Add FAQPage JSON-LD schema to the following 8 blog posts in priority order. Each FAQ block needs a minimum of 4 Q&A pairs with a direct answer in the first sentence of each Answer node (inverted pyramid format for AI citation): 
  1. /blog/garage-door-opener-making-beeping-sound/ — 35,542 impressions
  2. /blog/why-is-my-garage-door-reversing-before-it-touches-the-ground/
  3. /blog/can-a-garage-door-that-came-off-the-tracks-be-repaired/
  4. /blog/my-garage-door-opener-lights-are-flashing-what-does-that-mean/
  5. /blog/how-do-i-know-if-the-sensors-on-my-garage-door-are-misaligned/
  6. /blog/garage-door-torsion-spring-life-expectancy/
  7. /blog/diy-vs-professional-garage-door-installation-pros-and-cons/
  8. /blog/emergency-garage-door-repair-how-to-manually-open-garage-door/
Priority questions to include are documented in the strategy. Start with the beeping blog — it has 35,542 impressions at 0.17% CTR and is the highest-urgency fix on the site.

title: HowTo Schema on 3 Step-by-Step Guides
description:
Add HowTo JSON-LD schema to the following three blog posts. Each HowTo block must reference the numbered steps in the post using name and text properties, and include tool and supply arrays for E-E-A-T: 
  1. /blog/guide-to-garage-door-cable-replacement/ (3,378 words)
  2. /blog/emergency-garage-door-repair-how-to-manually-open-garage-door/ (927 words) — include a warning text node referencing torsion spring danger
  3. /blog/how-to-lubricate-a-garage-door/ (1,227 words)

title: Resolve /service-areas/ Legacy Namespace (16 URLs)
description:
Screaming Frog confirms 16 URLs under /service-areas/ (plural) are still being crawled as 301 redirects, and internal links are still pointing to them. Steps: 
  • Export the Inlinks report from Screaming Frog filtered to any URL containing /service-areas/. 
  • Update all identified internal links to point directly to their /service-area/ (singular) canonical equivalents. 
  • Verify each 301 is a single-hop redirect, no chains. 
  • Confirm redirect destinations are the correct canonical URLs, not the UTM-tagged variant.

title: Fix tx Suffix Inconsistency (18 City+Service Pages)
description:
Screaming Frog confirms 18 city+service pages use city slugs without the -tx suffix (/service-area/cedar-park/, /service-area/pflugerville/, /service-area/round-rock/, etc.) while their parent hub pages use the -tx suffix, disconnecting them architecturally. If the CMS allows: update slugs to include -tx, implement 301s from the old URLs, and update all internal links. If URL changes aren't feasible in Month 1: add canonical link elements on each affected page pointing to the -tx parent URL. 
Also remove or redirect /service-area/round-rock/garage-door-opener-repair-2/, the -2 suffix confirms CMS duplication.

title: Resolve UTM URL Canonical Issue (Round Rock)
description:
The UTM-tagged URL /service-area/round-rock-tx/?utm_source=google&utm_medium=organic&utm_campaign=GMB-78664 is receiving 43,688 impressions and ranking at position 3.47 — higher than the clean canonical URL, which is splitting authority.
Steps:
(1) Add a canonical tag to the UTM URL pointing to https://www.gatorgaragedoorrepair.com/service-area/round-rock-tx/.
(2) In Google Business Profile, confirm the website link points to the clean URL, GBP can still use UTM tracking without the UTM URL being the canonical destination.
(3) Monitor in GSC over 4 weeks for the clean URL to absorb the ranking position.

title: Phone Number Consolidation Across All Site Pages (NAP Consistency)
description:
Visual audit confirmed four distinct phone numbers across the site: (512) 524-7703 (Austin), (512) 518-5544 (Round Rock), (512) 823-1366 (emergency line), and (512) 886-3706 (Round Rock secondary).
This is an active local ranking suppressor.
Steps:
(1) Export all URLs from Screaming Frog where a non-primary number appears in body content, header, or footer.
(2) Standardize to two canonical numbers site-wide, one Austin primary, one Round Rock primary, matching each location's GBP listing exactly.
(3) Update footer, header, and all city page body copy accordingly. (4) Cross-reference against BBB listings for all 5 confirmed locations.
(5) Confirm GBP team aligns each profile number to match.

title: Write Meta Descriptions for 33 Brand & Category Pages
description: Screaming Frog confirmed 33 indexable pages with missing meta descriptions, concentrated in the /brands/ directory (all LiftMaster model pages, Chamberlain brand page, all Genie model pages) and /category/ archive pages. Priority order: Chamberlain parent page, LiftMaster parent page, LiftMaster 84504R (200 vol confirmed in Ahrefs), remaining LiftMaster model pages, Genie parent page, all 7 Genie model pages. Use this formula: [Brand + Model] garage door opener repair in Austin [+ Round Rock where relevant]. [Key service hook]. [Review count]. Call (512) 524-7703. For the 7 /category/ archive pages, add noindex instead of a meta description. They have no ranking value and removing them from Google's index recovers crawl budget.

title: Meta Description Rewrites, Top 5 Striking Distance Pages
description:
These pages are ranking but not converting clicks — CTR failures, not ranking failures. Rewrite meta descriptions for the following 5 pages (all under 155 characters): 
  • /services/garage-door-repair/ — "Austin's top-rated garage door repair, 4,600+ reviews. Same-day service, fully-stocked trucks. Licensed & insured. Call (512) 524-7703."
  • /services/emergency-door-service/ — "24/7 emergency garage door repair in Austin. Average response: under 40 min. Spring, cable, off-track — fixed on first visit. Call now."
  • /services/garage-door-installation/ — "New garage door installation in Austin — same-day available. Amarr, Clopay, LiftMaster. Free estimate, fully licensed crew. Book today."
  • /service-area/round-rock-tx/ — "Gator Garage Doors serves all Round Rock neighborhoods — La Frontera, Brushy Creek, Round Rock West. Same-day repair, 24/7 emergency. Call now."
  • /service-area/cedar-park-tx/ — "Same-day garage door repair in Cedar Park, TX. Spring repair, opener install, emergency service. 4,600+ 5-star reviews. Call (512) 524-7703."

title: Update Financing Page
description:
Seeking help make the following changes on their site please.

https://www.gatorgaragedoorrepair.com/financing/


Client Goal: Update the financing page to accurately reflect Gator Garage Doors' current financing provider, Synchrony, and direct interested customers to the contact page rather than an external application.


Requirements for Completion:

  • Synchrony logo is added to the financing page attached 
  • Page copy is updated to reflect Synchrony financing, using content from synchrony.com/financing/paylater as the reference
  • "Apply Now" and "Apply online" button is removed
  • "Contact Us" button is added in its place, linking to gatorgaragedoorrepair.com/contact/
